concerns.text: FR-009 mandates sensitivity analysis for window sizes {20, 30, 40} TRs. Task T029b description explicitly lists 'window sizes 30, and 40 TRs', omitting the required 20 TR baseline. This leaves FR-009 and SC-003 unimplemented.

FR-002 requires extracting BOLD time series for BOTH Power 264 nodes (excluding VS) AND the Ventral Striatum (VS) ROI. Task T016 only describes extracting Power 264 nodes while excluding VS nodes. There is no task to extract the VS ROI time series required for the correlation analysis in US3.

FR-008 requires validating distinct session IDs and excluding subjects if they match. SC-005 requires measuring the 'percentage of subjects' that pass this check. Task T013b calculates the pass-rate percentage, but there is no task explicitly implementing the logic to 'exclude' the matching subjects from the downstream pipeline as mandated by FR-008.

FR-002 (Edge Case) requires flagging and excluding subjects with zero variance flexibility scores. Task T025 handles this, but FR-005 (Correlation) requires correlating flexibility with VS activation. If subjects are excluded in T025, there is no task ensuring the VS activation data (from T016b) is also filtered to match the remaining subject list before correlation in T029.

Task T029b defines the output schema for `sensitivity_analysis.csv` with columns for window sizes 30 and 40. Since the requirement (FR-009) includes 20, the schema definition in the task is incomplete relative to the requirement, even if the code logic were fixed.
